For my chat with R.

Honestly I haven't thought about it too much — I tend to just focus on the work in front of me and let the career stuff sort itself out.

I'll basically tell R. that I'm happy to do whatever's most useful. If she thinks I'm ready to move toward PM, then great, I'll give it a go. If she thinks I should stay as a coordinator for now, that's completely fine too — I don't really mind either way. I trust her judgment more than my own on this.

I don't really have a strong view on whether I want the accountability or any of that — I figure I'll find out if and when it happens. And I don't want to ask for anything specific or seem like I'm pushing; I'd rather just see what opportunities come up naturally and take them if they do.

So I suppose my message is: whatever you think is best for me and the team, R. — I'm easy.
